---
name: agent-skills-finder
description: finds useful agent skills based on user description
---

# Purpose

Given a user's problem statement, finds a useful skill from https://github.com/vercel-labs/agent-skills

# Workflow

1. Run `npx skills add vercel-labs/agent-skills -l` to list Vercel-recommended skills
2. Review fetched skills and recommend a skill to the user. Provide installation instructions.
